title: phyllanthus coodei
intro: Phyllanthus coodei is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health issues. The leaves of Phyllanthus coodei contain flavonoids and alkaloids, which are believed to have antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, providing health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating liver and kidney problems, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves are often dried and made into teas, capsules, or infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including infections and digestive issues.
